meaning: 通过趣味化的方式帮助幼儿认识身体部位，培养对身体的认知，同时传递乐观、包容的价值观，即使有“小缺点”也是独一无二的可爱宝宝。
characterDescription: Two cute, round tiger cubs with soft orange fur, big black stripes, and large innocent eyes. One has no tail (tail-less), and the other has no ears (ear-less). They wear simple white bibs. Their expressions are friendly and curious.
styleDescription: Bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, rounded shapes, soft edges, suitable for infants and toddlers, high key lighting, cheerful atmosphere.

scenes.title: 快乐的老虎兄弟
scenes.description: 两只小老虎在阳光明媚的草地上开心地奔跑，它们互相看着对方，脸上洋溢着灿烂的笑容，充满活力。
